content: Stormcloak Soldier: Damn this rain... makes my chainmail chafe in all the wrong places. At least the cold keeps the daedra-spawned skeeters from biting my balls like last summer. Lydia: Hmph. Could be worse - could be stuck guarding some Imperial shit-stain's treasury, watching his limp-dick nobles fuck elven whores all night. At least we bleed for a real cause. Stormcloak Soldier: Aye! Though I wouldn't mind bleeding some Thalmor cunts tonight. Their tight little robes leave just enough room for my axe between those pointed ears. Lydia: Fuck yes. I dream about splitting their skulls open while MJR pounds me from behind...
